description: CASE with all non-null branches and an ELSE clause is non-nullable

columns.name: active
columns.note: all THEN branches and ELSE are non-null literals

name: case_with_else
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserActiveFlag
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS active FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())

sqlc_comparison.scythe_improvement: scythe analyzes all CASE branches and ELSE to determine nullability precisely
sqlc_comparison.sqlc_behavior: sqlc may conservatively mark CASE expressions as nullable
